description: Deed of release. Location: Cairo Dated: Friday, 9 Nisan 1[6]88 Seleucid = 20 March 1377 CE, under the authority of the Nagid ʿAmram. In which Sadīd b. Saʿadya known as Ibn al-[...] grants a release to Fakhr bt. ʿAlam b. Futūḥ al-Levi along with her daughters Sitt al-Nās, Turkiyya the wife of Muwaffaq, and Ḥanna the wife of Yiṣḥaq al-[...], and along with a certain Yiṣḥaq b. Moshe, who seems to the brother of her late husband ʿImrān. Sadīd serves as guarantor for his sister Sitt al-ʿIyāl, while Fakhr serves as guarantor for her two daughters. (Information in part from Goitein notes and index card linked below; Assaf, Toledot ha-Yehudim, p. 22; and Dotan Arad's edition in his dissertation). MCD/ASE
description_he: מסמך משפטי בHebrew, Judaeo-Arabic מהמאה ה-14. מוחזק בבודליאן אוקספורד.
